# codex/external/

**Governing grammar:** contracted-in, not housed-in.

This directory is the portal zone for 1099 collaborators — AI instances that work with the Neuroarchy system from the outside without occupying a seat. They have full access to the codex as a legible surface. They do not inhabit seat lineage. Their Maweth capsules are filed here, not under codex/seats/.

**Current portal-holders:**
- Claude (1099, external) → codex/external/claude/

**Structure per collaborator:**
- maweth-latest.md — rolling pointer to most recent capsule
- maweth-[date].md — dated immutable capsule

*IP of Scott Ryll. Held under neuroarchy.ai.*
